title: Real-site enablement: opt-in real tier, selector discovery, UC1-3 real acceptance (D-002)
status: DONE/PARTIAL-FINAL (manager-5 RESUME4 pid 119225): real tier ENABLED + independently verified (T4 panel UNANIMOUS PASS); UC1+UC3 real-PASS (text+continuity, API+CLI); UC2 real-PARTIAL (D-001 fenced-bundle channel not viable on real site -> recommend revision); GAP-15 registry-persistence finding; verify.md VERDICT PARTIAL; VERIFICATION.md M-006 final section written; handoff replaced; budget 24/30. [history] IN_PROGRESS CDP UNGATED — operator Chrome 149 reachable on 127.0.0.1:9222; singleton-elected via atomic lock tmp/M-006-manager.lock (TRIPLE-LAUNCH apparatus bug: 3 resume4 managers under team-lead 4327 — A=watch118385/tmux193152, B=ME watch119170/tmux193303, C=watch120233/tmux193414; I won the lock, siblings stand down). Executing T2 CDP discovery. [prior manager-4 RESUME3]: post-operator-pause (trip) resume on the CDP-attach plan (orchestration/tasks/MISSION-006-RESUME2.md is the live plan). Re-anchored from ground truth: sole-live M-006 manager (no sibling), budget 0/30 intact, HEAD bb50a35. T1b's suspect mid-leg edits (killed by the operator pause) reverted to the clean T1 baseline; T1b DONE + manager-gate-verified + committed (f9c330e); authoritative suite 136 passed / 1 deselected / exit 0. T2/T3 real legs OPERATOR-GATED: CDP endpoint 127.0.0.1:9222 is PORT_9222_CLOSED at preflight (operator must run, during a run window: chromium --profile-directory='Profile 1' --remote-debugging-port=9222). T1 unchanged (DONE+committed 3693388).
status_explanation: Automated/tier-plumbing half (T1) DONE + manager-gate-verified (mock suite 132 passed/1 deselected, exit 0; real.json all-empty fail-closed; double-gate + allowlist + preflight + executable_path in commit 3693388). Real-site half pivoted to CDP-ATTACH per operator decision B2 (D-002 addendum, commit 1120a1b) because chatgpt.com serves a Cloudflare bot interstitial to any Playwright-LAUNCHED browser (B1 'logged out' REFUTED; see RESUME-FINDING-cloudflare.md). New leg T1b builds/tests the channel=cdp attach mechanics entirely against a throwaway local browser + the mock fixture (zero real-site contact). T1b was IN-FLIGHT when the operator paused for a trip (commit bb50a35) and its pi worker was hard-killed ~19 min in; its unfinished, unverified, uncommitted edits were reverted by manager-4 (see manager_lifetimes[3]) and T1b is being re-run fresh. Real legs T2/T3 wait on the operator's CDP browser being up.

manager_lifetimes.note: Canonical sibling primary. A DUPLICATE manager (PID 3286529) double-launched at 09:58, self-detected, STOOD DOWN at ~10:09 with ZERO harm. Apparatus bug surfaced to lead/operator (recommend per-mission singleton spawn guard).

First resume manager. Sole-live confirmed. Created resume audit ledger tmp/real-audit-20260612T111042/messages.log (0 data lines). Established prior T2 BLOCK root cause was misdiagnosed as 'logged out'; later REFUTED by 3 zero-message probes -> the real wall is a Cloudflare interstitial (B2).

Second resume manager. Operator decision B2 = CDP attach (option B). Authored + committed (1120a1b) the D-002 addendum and RESUME2 contract; authored + committed the T1b contract (orchestration/tasks/M-006/T1b-cdp-channel.md). Dispatched pi worker T1b; was mid-leg when the operator paused the mission for a trip. KILLED by the operator-pause (bb50a35); its state.json update was left mid-write (this file's predecessor).

Post-operator-pause (trip) resume manager. Ground-truth re-anchor: sibling-pid scan -> ONLY my own tree carries the M-006 RESUME prompt (launcher 6002 -> watch 6035 -> claude 6057; team-lead lineage 4327). The W150-W161 pi processes (parent claude 3389) are programs/pastore-repair workers -> DIFFERENT program, NOT M-006, NOT mine to touch. NO live sibling M-006 manager; tmux shows only my session. Budget re-verified from BOTH ledgers: tmp/real-audit-20260612T100518/messages.log (3 lines, 0 data) + tmp/real-audit-20260612T111042/messages.log (4 lines, 0 data) = 0/30 spent. HEAD bb50a35; dirty tree matched the pause record. T1b dirty-tree decision = pause-record option (a): reverted the suspect mid-leg T1b edits (driver.py +111, errors.py +18, test_driver.py) to the clean T1 baseline. NOTE: `git checkout`/`git clean` are blocked by the global destructive-guard.sh hook -> used `git stash push -u -- src/ tests/` instead (NON-destructive; src/+tests/ now == HEAD; suspect edits preserved in stash@{0} as a recoverable safety net; orchestration/state + orchestration/prompts untouched). REWORK-CAUSE: other (operator-pause kill mid-leg). CDP preflight 127.0.0.1:9222 = PORT_9222_CLOSED -> T2/T3 operator-gated. Re-dispatched T1b fresh (mock-tier, no operator).

FINAL resume manager; CDP now UNGATED. Singleton election: atomic lock dir tmp/M-006-manager.lock created via race-free mkdir test-and-set -> WON at 19:38:22 (holder file records pid 119225). TRIPLE-LAUNCH apparatus bug recurred: team-lead 4327 spawned THREE resume4 managers within ~2.5min (A=watch118385/tmux...193152 @19:31:52; B=ME watch119170/tmux...193303 @19:33:03; C=watch120233/tmux...193414 @19:34:14 with --wait-seconds 30). Siblings A/C will hit the held lock and stand down (precedent: manager-1 duplicate stood down, zero harm). Surfaced to team-lead via stdout + handoff; RECOMMEND per-mission singleton spawn guard in the launcher. Re-anchored from ground truth: CDP 127.0.0.1:9222 reachable (Chrome/149.0.7827.53 via /json/version read-only preflight, ZERO real messages); budget 0/30 re-verified (both ledgers 0 data lines); T1 DONE (T1.md:152, commit 3693388), T1b DONE (T1b.md:40 MESSAGES_USED 0, commit f9c330e). Proceeding: revise T2 contract for CDP -> dispatch ONE real worker (<=12 msgs) -> T2b -> T3 (<=15) -> T4 panel.

objective: Plumb an opt-in, bounded, audited real-site test tier (D-002); empirically discover real chatgpt.com selectors/affordances and fill real.json; run UC1-3 real-site acceptance; independently verify (best-of-N) and update VERIFICATION.md real-site scope with a final VERDICT. Real-site contact is via CDP-attach to the operator's own signed-in Chromium (operator decision B2), never an automated launch, never stealth.

real_message_budget.note: Budget spans ALL manager lifetimes AND both ledgers (sum). Recompute on resume = data_lines(prior)+data_lines(resume). Verified 0+0=0 at manager-4 start. Every real message logged BEFORE send. Exhausted -> finish verifiable, handoff PARTIAL, NEVER exceed.

constraints.real_site: Permitted ONLY in T2/T3 within budget. CDP-attach to operator's running signed-in Chromium (connect_over_cdp), headed, human-paced, ONE real worker at a time (serialize). Open a NEW tab for all tool activity; NEVER touch/navigate/close operator tabs; NEVER quit the attached browser (detach only). Login NEVER automated; logged-out -> LoginRequiredError, STOP. Cloudflare/human-verification challenge -> ChallengePresentError + challenge-pause protocol (read-only poll <=10min, else PARTIAL). Never read/store/log credentials/cookies/tokens/profile contents. No account identifiers in any artifact/report/commit/code.
constraints.default_tier: Stays loopback-mock-only; autouse socket guard must never be weakened; clean `uv run pytest` collects ZERO real_site tests.
constraints.write_scope: Only inside /home/abhmul/dev/ask-chatgpt (+ tmp/). Archive READ-ONLY. Never write .claude/ or .agents/. Never touch shared agent venv. uv sync --all-groups ALWAYS. Serialize pytest. NEVER git push.
constraints.real_legs_serialize: Real-site legs never overlap. pi launches serialize on this harness anyway (budget N-panel as ~sum).

cdp_attach_plan.decision: B2 = CDP attach (operator, 2026-06-12; D-002 addendum commit 1120a1b)
cdp_attach_plan.manager_coordination_rule: T1b needs no operator. Before T2: preflight CDP; if unreachable do NOT idle beyond one 480s watch -> handoff PARTIAL with CDP_UNREACHABLE + the launch command, exit cleanly; team lead coordinates the window.

ground_truth_facts.errors_present: errors.py has LoginRequiredError, ProfileLockedError, SelectorUnavailableError, AskChatGPTError, RateLimitedError. T1b ADDS CDPUnreachableError + ChallengePresentError.
ground_truth_facts.socket_guard: tests/conftest.py autouse session-scoped loopback/AF_UNIX-only guard; pytest_collection_modifyitems skips real_site unless ASK_CHATGPT_REAL=1.
